stopping_condition: 3 consecutive non-improving iterations (spec default stopping rule)
final_champion: finsight_direction_classifier_v1 (solo XGBoost) -- unchanged, no iteration beat it

iterations.change_description: Soft-voting ensemble of the 3 gate-passing model families (random_forest + catboost + xgboost, averaged predict_proba)
iterations.hypothesis: Averaging independently-trained models reduces variance and may pick up complementary signal each model misses alone.

iterations.change_description: SHAP-guided feature pruning: dropped the bottom 30% of features by mean|SHAP| (9 features: ['rsi_14', 'bollinger_pct_b', 'bollinger_bandwidth', 'lag_return_5', 'macd_signal', 'sma_20_dist', 'ema_20_dist', 'momentum_10', 'volume_ratio_5_20']), retrained XGBoost with the same champion hyperparameters on the remaining 18
iterations.hypothesis: Several features had exactly-zero SHAP importance (the model never split on them) -- removing pure noise dimensions may reduce overfitting and improve generalization.

iterations.change_description: Recency-weighted training: linear sample_weight ramp from 0.5 (oldest train row) to 1.5 (most recent), same champion XGBoost hyperparameters and full feature set
iterations.hypothesis: Market regime may drift over a 3.5-year training window; weighting recent rows more heavily could make the model more relevant to current conditions at the cost of some historical signal.
